headline: How Investors May Respond To LyondellBasell Industries (LYB) Upbeat Analyst Outlook Amid Notable Insider Selling
summary: Recently, LyondellBasell Industries reported improving analyst sentiment and a stronger earnings outlook, supported by upgrades and a higher consensus earnings estimate relative to earlier expectations. At the same time, insider share sales totaling about US$26.3 million over the past three months without corresponding insider buying have raised questions about how management views the current valuation. We’ll now examine how this improved analyst outlook, set against cautious insider...
